meaning: n.农夫,百姓,农民,农场主,承包主,牧场主,畜牧者
examples: There once was a poor farmer who had four sons.
A farmer is entitled to a certain particularized tax treatment.
At first glance, organic farming looks much more expensive for the farmer.
She tucked in, with gusto, when food was on offer at a farmer's market.
For marital happiness marry a coal miner, construction worker, oil platform engineer, farmer, etc.
